implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Create deploy/nas/docker-compose.yml with pgvector/pgvector:pg16 and NAS-specific configuration
Create deploy/nas/initdb/01_extensions.sql for pgvector extension initialization
Create deploy/nas/deploy.sh as idempotent deployment script with gate G2
Create deploy/nas/smoke.sh with validation gates G3-G5
Create deploy/nas/.env.deploy.example with five required configuration fields
Ensure all scripts pass bash syntax validation

completion_promises.criterion_text: `deploy/nas/docker-compose.yml` exists: image `pgvector/pgvector:pg16`, service `fleet_memory_postgres`, `restart: unless-stopped`, bind mount `${NAS_DOCKER_ROOT}/pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data`, port `5432:5432`, `env_file: .env` (compose auto-loads `POSTGRES_PASSWORD`), mounts `./initdb` to `/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d`; comments document the DSM firewall expectation (LAN + tailnet `100.64.0.0/10` only)
completion_promises.evidence: Created deploy/nas/docker-compose.yml with pgvector/pgvector:pg16 image, fleet_memory_postgres service name, restart: unless-stopped policy, bind mount using ${NAS_DOCKER_ROOT}/pgdata, port mapping 5432:5432, env_file: .env for POSTGRES_PASSWORD, initdb volume mount to /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d, and comprehensive firewall documentation in comments specifying LAN subnet and Tailscale CGNAT range 100.64.0.0/10

completion_promises.criterion_text: `deploy/nas/initdb/01_extensions.sql` contains `CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;` (same content as deploy/local — runbook gate G3 baked into the container)

completion_promises.criterion_text: `deploy/nas/deploy.sh` is executable, `set -euo pipefail`, sources `.env.deploy`, performs rsync + remote `.env` render + `docker compose up -d` exactly per runbook Phases 2–3, carries gate G2 inline with PASS/FAIL echo labels, contains no `sshpass` and no plaintext password literal
completion_promises.evidence: Created deploy/nas/deploy.sh with execute permissions (chmod +x), set -euo pipefail at top, sources .env.deploy with validation, performs rsync of compose files excluding .env.deploy*, renders remote .env with POSTGRES_PASSWORD (no plaintext in script), executes sudo -n docker compose up -d, implements GATE G2 with container status check and explicit PASS/FAIL labels, uses SSH key-based auth only (no sshpass), exits non-zero on failure

completion_promises.criterion_text: `deploy/nas/smoke.sh` is executable, carries gates G3 (pg_isready over SSH), G4 (`psql` over the LAN/Tailscale DSN returns 1), G5 (`pgdata/PG_VERSION` reads 16 on the backed-up share) inline with PASS/FAIL labels, and exits non-zero on any gate failure
completion_promises.evidence: Created deploy/nas/smoke.sh with execute permissions (chmod +x), set -euo pipefail for fail-fast behavior, implements GATE G3 (pg_isready + pgvector extension check via SSH docker exec), GATE G4 (direct psql connection over network using LAN/Tailscale DSN without SSH tunnel), GATE G5 (verifies PG_VERSION=16 exists at ${NAS_DOCKER_ROOT}/pgdata), all gates have explicit PASS/FAIL echo labels, exits with code 1 on any gate failure
